_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the sensitivity-label-rejection (branch 5) of the excel-activities/excel-application-card-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException referencing Microsoft Purview sensitivity label 'Confidential - Client Data') → jobs logs (workbook label detection + card config inspection showing SensitivityLabel and SensitivityOperation properties NOT configured + package v2.24.7 supports these properties) → workflow source. The protected workbook with no label-handling on the card is the smoking gun.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f00ddddd-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
